user.title: Autovelox & Tutor Italy
user.description:
Select the Italian regions to monitor and the weekly update schedule.

Data source: Polizia di Stato - Servizio Polizia Stradale.

data.google_api_key: Google API Key (leave empty to use OpenStreetMap only)

data.export_mymaps: Enable automatic saving to Google My Maps

data.retry_choice: What do you want to do?

error.no_regions_selected: Please select at least one region.
error.invalid_google_api_key: Invalid or unauthorized Google API key for Geocoding.
error.oauth_failed: Google authorization failed. Please try again.
error.missing_oauth_credentials: Please enter both Client ID and Client Secret.
error.oauth_device_error: Could not start Google authorization. Check your credentials.

aggiorna.name: Refresh data
aggiorna.description: Force an immediate refresh of speed camera and tutor data.

region.name: Region
region.description: Specific region to update (optional, e.g. 'marche'). If omitted, updates all regions.

scarica_kml.name: Download KML
scarica_kml.description: Generate a KML file with all speed camera and tutor points, saved to /config/www/.

region.name: Region
region.description: Region for which to generate the KML (e.g. 'marche').

esporta_mymaps.name: Export to Google My Maps
esporta_mymaps.description: Force export of all points to Google My Maps.
